moments.title: World Cup Quarter-Finals Kick Off
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stage continues with the Quarter-Finals starting on July 9, leading up to the final on July 19.

angles.name: Quarter-Final Hype
angles.copy: Who makes the final four? The World Cup Quarter-Finals kick off tomorrow, and the tension is palpable. What's your prediction?

angles.name: Tournament Buzz
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the Round of 16? Get ready for more drama as the World Cup Quarter-Finals are just around the corner.

moments.title: Wimbledon Quarter-Finals Day 2
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships run until July 12, with today, July 8, featuring the second day of Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Quarter-finals.

angles.name: Centre Court Action
angles.copy: It's Quarter-Finals day at Wimbledon! Who are you backing for a spot in the semis on the grass today?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: The tension is mounting at SW19. Can any British players make it through today's Quarter-Finals?

moments.title: Tour de France Stage 5
moments.blurb: The Tour de France 2026, running until July 26, is currently in Stage 5 today, a flat 158.3km ride from Lannemezan to Pau.

source.l: Tour de France Official / Red Bull

angles.name: Peloton Update
angles.copy: Another day, another stage! The Tour de France peloton is tackling Stage 5 today. Who's in the yellow jersey?

angles.name: Sprint Finish?
angles.copy: Stage 5 of the Tour de France is a flat one today – perfect for the sprinters! Get ready for a thrilling finish.

moments.title: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship will be played at Royal Birkdale from July 16-19, with practice days starting July 12.

angles.name: Countdown to The Open
angles.copy: Less than 10 days until The Open Championship returns to Royal Birkdale! Who are you tipping for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Golf's Greatest
angles.copy: The world's best golfers head to Merseyside next week for The Open. Get ready for four days of unforgettable links golf!

moments.title: 2000trees Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 2000trees Festival in Gloucestershire starts today, July 8, and runs until July 11, featuring a lineup of indie, punk, and rock acts.

angles.name: Festival Gates Open
angles.copy: Let the good times roll! 2000trees Festival starts today in Gloucestershire. Who's heading down?

angles.name: Rocking Out
angles.copy: Four days of incredible music kicks off today at 2000trees! Get ready to discover your new favourite band.

moments.title: Henley Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The Henley Festival, known for its unique blend of music and arts, starts today, July 8, and runs until July 12 in Henley-on-Thames.

angles.name: Culture by the Thames
angles.copy: Henley Festival opens its doors today! Five days of world-class music, comedy, and art by the river. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Ready for the Glamour
angles.copy: Black tie and brilliant music – Henley Festival is back! What acts are you most excited to see this week?

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13, which started June 1, continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with the final expected around late July.

angles.name: Villa Drama Tonight
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! What's got the villa talking tonight?

angles.name: Grafting Season
angles.copy: Who's coupling up and who's getting pied? Catch all the latest from the Love Island villa tonight.

moments.title: Elle (Legally Blonde Prequel) Streaming
moments.blurb: The 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', which follows a teenage Elle Woods, premiered on Prime Video on July 1 and is available to stream.

angles.name: New Series Alert
angles.copy: If you loved Legally Blonde, you need to check out 'Elle' on Prime Video! Get your pink ready for some serious teen drama.

angles.name: What's Your Verdict?
angles.copy: Have you started watching 'Elle' yet? The Legally Blonde prequel is streaming now – what do you think of teenage Elle Woods?

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: The second season of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premieres globally on Netflix on Sunday, July 12.

angles.name: Post-Pod Drama
angles.copy: The pods are closed, but the drama continues! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 lands on Netflix this Sunday.

angles.name: Catching Up with Couples
angles.copy: Ready to see who's still together (and who's definitely not)? 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' S2 is coming soon!

moments.title: Dan Reynolds turns 39
moments.blurb: Imagine Dragons frontman Dan Reynolds celebrates his 39th birthday on July 14.

angles.name: Imagine Dragons Leader
angles.copy: Believer! Imagine Dragons' Dan Reynolds turns 39 this Sunday. What's your favourite track from the band?

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a happy 39th birthday to Imagine Dragons' incredible frontman, Dan Reynolds, this Sunday!

moments.title: Taboo (Black Eyed Peas) turns 51
moments.blurb: Black Eyed Peas member Taboo celebrates his 51st birthday on July 14.

angles.name: Black Eyed Peas Star
angles.copy: Where is the love? It's coming this Sunday for Taboo from Black Eyed Peas, who turns 51!

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 51st birthday on Sunday to the one and only Taboo from Black Eyed Peas! What's your favourite BEP hit?

moments.title: Chris Cross (Ultravox) turns 74
moments.blurb: Ultravox bassist Chris Cross celebrates his 74th birthday on July 14.

angles.name: 80s Synth Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 74th birthday this Sunday to Chris Cross, the legendary bassist from Ultravox!

angles.name: New Wave Pioneer
angles.copy: Vienna calling! Chris Cross of Ultravox fame turns 74 on Sunday. What's your favourite Ultravox track?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt turns 80
moments.blurb: Iconic singer Linda Ronstadt celebrates her 80th birthday on July 15.

angles.name: Vocal Legend
angles.copy: Happy 80th birthday this Monday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt! Her voice has graced so many timeless hits.

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: 80 years young! Celebrate Linda Ronstadt's birthday this Monday by listening to some of her greatest songs.

moments.title: Joe Satriani turns 70
moments.blurb: Master instrumental rock guitarist Joe Satriani celebrates his 70th birthday on July 15.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Shredding into his 70s! Happy birthday this Monday to the legendary guitarist Joe Satriani.

angles.name: Instrumental Genius
angles.copy: A true guitar hero turns 70 on Monday! Celebrate Joe Satriani's birthday with some epic instrumental rock.

moments.title: Millie Jackson turns 82
moments.blurb: Soul and R&B singer-songwriter Millie Jackson celebrates her 82nd birthday on July 15.

angles.name: Soulful Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 82nd birthday this Monday to the incredible Millie Jackson, a true icon of soul and R&B!

angles.name: R&B Queen
angles.copy: Celebrating 82 years of soulful music! Wishing a very happy birthday to Millie Jackson this Monday.

moments.title: Olly Alexander turns 36
moments.blurb: Years & Years frontman Olly Alexander celebrates his 36th birthday on July 15.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: It's a King's birthday this Monday! Olly Alexander from Years & Years turns 36. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Years & Years Celebration
angles.copy: Happy 36th birthday to the brilliant Olly Alexander this Monday! What's your top Years & Years tune?

moments.title: Tom Fletcher (McFly) turns 41
moments.blurb: McFly singer and guitarist Tom Fletcher celebrates his 41st birthday on July 17.

source.l: Famous Birthdays / This Day In Music

angles.name: McFly's Main Man
angles.copy: It's all about you! Happy 41st birthday this Wednesday to McFly's very own Tom Fletcher. What's your favourite McFly song?

angles.name: Pop-Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a massive happy 41st birthday to McFly legend Tom Fletcher this Wednesday! Time for a pop-punk playlist.

moments.title: Geezer Butler (Black Sabbath) turns 77
moments.blurb: Black Sabbath bassist and primary lyricist Geezer Butler celebrates his 77th birthday on July 17.

source.l: This Day In Music / Famous Birthdays

angles.name: Metal Icon
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday this Wednesday to the legendary Geezer Butler, the lyrical mastermind behind Black Sabbath!

angles.name: Heavy Metal Pioneer
angles.copy: The riff master turns 77 this Wednesday! Celebrate Geezer Butler's birthday with some classic Black Sabbath.

moments.title: Wolfgang Flur (Kraftwerk) turns 79
moments.blurb: Former Kraftwerk percussionist and electronic music pioneer Wolfgang Flur celebrates his 79th birthday on July 17.

angles.name: Electronic Music Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday this Wednesday to Wolfgang Flur of Kraftwerk! A true innovator of electronic music.

angles.name: Synth Wizard
angles.copy: Celebrating Wolfgang Flur's 79th birthday this Wednesday! What's your favourite Kraftwerk track that still sounds futuristic today?

moments.title: Regina Belle turns 63
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning R&B and soul singer Regina Belle celebrates her 63rd birthday on July 17.

angles.name: Soulful Diva
angles.copy: Happy 63rd birthday this Wednesday to the incredible R&B and soul diva, Regina Belle! What's your favourite song of hers?

angles.name: Powerhouse Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating the amazing Regina Belle's 63rd birthday this Wednesday! Her voice is pure magic.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23-26, celebrating 20 years with a diverse lineup of music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Suffolk's Big One
angles.copy: Get ready, Suffolk! Latitude Festival is just over two weeks away. Who are you excited to see at Henham Park?

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on for Latitude Festival! Celebrating 20 years of music, arts, and discovery. Are you going?
